strategy: Bring Death attacks. He is Life, resists his own school, and Death pressures his self-heals.
Build damage with Blades, not Traps or Damage-over-Time. Every harmful Ward or DoT you cast heals him 75 over 3 Rounds.
Focus the Chief Whip himself, not the Bulldog Sergeant Major. Killing the minion first revives it once and heals the whole enemy team 15%.
Expect him to reach his spells faster; the Bulldog Sergeant Major Donates Power to him.
Finish with one AoE so the Chief Whip and the minion die the same round, avoiding the revive.
cheatNotes: Casting a harmful Ward (a Trap) heals him 75 over 3 Rounds. Build with Blades instead.
Casting a Damage-over-Time heals him 75 over 3 Rounds. Skip DoTs here.
The Bulldog Sergeant Major Donates Power to the Chief Whip, speeding up his bigger spells.
If you kill the Bulldog Sergeant Major before the Chief Whip, he heals all allies 15% and revives it once. Kill him first or AoE both together.
